info.title: Delphi Markets WebSocket API
info.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming endpoints for Delphi Markets.

tags.name: Kalshi WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Kalshi market data. Subscribe to ticker and orderbook updates using klsi_id.

tags.name: Polymarket WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Polymarket data. Subscribe to price updates using condition_id or orderbook updates using market_id.

tags.name: Predict.fun WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Predict.fun market data.

tags.name: Limitless WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Limitless market data.

tags.name: Gemini WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Gemini prediction market data.

tags.name: Manifold WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Manifold prediction market data.

tags.name: Opinion WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for Opinion prediction market data.

tags.name: ForecastEx WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for ForecastEx prediction market data. Prices and trades only (no orderbook).

tags.name: PredictIt WebSocket
tags.description: Real-time WebSocket streaming for PredictIt prediction market data. Prices only (no orderbook or trades).

get.description:
Connect to the Kalshi WebSocket for real-time price, orderbook, and trade updates.

---

Connection:

Connect to the WebSocket endpoint:

Connect to: wss://api.delphiterminal.co/ws/kalshi

---

Subscribing to Markets:

Once connected, send a JSON message to subscribe to Kalshi markets using their `klsi_id`:

{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "klsi_ids": ["KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000", "KXETHD-25FEB14-B3100"],
  "message_types": ["prices", "orderbook", "trades"]
}

Subscription Fields:

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| action | string | Yes | `subscribe` or `unsubscribe` |
| klsi_ids | array | Yes | Array of Kalshi market identifiers |
| message_types | array | No | `["prices"]`, `["orderbook"]`, `["trades"]`, or any combination. Defaults to prices and orderbook if omitted |

---

Unsubscribing:

{
  "action": "unsubscribe",
  "klsi_ids": ["KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000"]
}

---

Message Types:

Price Messages:

Real-time price updates for subscribed markets:

{
  "klsi_id": "KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000",
  "price": 0.65,
  "yes_bid": 0.64,
  "yes_ask": 0.66,
  "volume": 15000,
  "open_interest": 8500,
  "last_update": "2026-02-03T14:30:00Z"
}

Orderbook Messages:

Real-time orderbook snapshots for subscribed markets:

{
  "klsi_id": "KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000",
  "bid_side": [0, 0, 0, ..., 150, 200, 100],
  "ask_side": [100, 150, 200, ..., 0, 0, 0],
  "last_update": "2026-02-03T14:30:00Z"
}

Trade Messages:

Real-time trade executions for subscribed markets:

{
  "id": "trade123",
  "klsi_id": "KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000",
  "exchange": "klsi",
  "yes_price": 0.65,
  "no_price": 0.35,
  "count": 10,
  "taker_side": "buy",
  "last_update": "2026-02-03T14:30:00Z"
}

---

Full JavaScript Example:

Connect to: wss://api.delphiterminal.co/ws/kalshi

ws.onopen = () => {
  console.log('Connected to Kalshi WebSocket
  
  // Subscribe to markets
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    action: 'subscribe',
    klsi_ids: ['KXBTCD-25FEB14-B55000'],
    message_types: ['prices', 'orderbook', 'trades']
  }));
};

ws.onmessage = (event) => {
  const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
  console.log('Received:', data);
};

ws.onclose = () => {
  console.log('Disconnected from WebSocket
};

ws.onerror = (error) => {
  console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
};

---

Connection Details:

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Protocol | WebSocket (wss://) |
| Keepalive | Ping every 54 seconds |
| Timeout | 60 seconds without pong |
| Max Message Size | 512 KB |

---

Notes:

- **No authentication required** for WebSocket connection
- You must use `klsi_id` (Kalshi market identifier) to subscribe
- Messages are only sent for markets you have explicitly subscribed to
- Multiple markets can be subscribed in a single message
- Subscribe to specific message types to reduce message volume
- Trades must be explicitly requested (not included in default subscription)

## Example

- Request: `GET /ws/kalshi`
- Header: `X-API-Key: YOUR_API_KEY`

Connect to the PredictIt WebSocket for real-time price updates. PredictIt does not provide orderbook depth or individual trade data.

---

Connection:

Connect to the WebSocket endpoint:

Connect to: wss://api.delphiterminal.co/ws/prdi

---

Subscribing to Markets:

Once connected, send a JSON message to subscribe to PredictIt data using their `market_id`:

{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market_ids": ["34256"],
  "message_types": ["prices"]
}

Subscription Fields:

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| action | string | Yes | `subscribe` or `unsubscribe` |
| market_ids | array | Yes | Array of PredictIt market identifiers (numeric strings) |
| message_types | array | No | `["prices"]` only. Defaults to prices if omitted. **No orderbook or trades available.** |

---

Unsubscribing:

{
  "action": "unsubscribe",
  "market_ids": ["34256"]
}

---

Message Types:

Price Messages:

Real-time price updates for subscribed markets:

{
  "type": "prices",
  "data": {
    "venue": "PRDI",
    "market_id": "34256",
    "server_time": 1774762511552,
    "ingest_time": 1774762511553,
    "payload": {
      "type": "Ticker",
      "Ticker": {
        "price": 0.42,
        "yes_bid": 0.41,
        "yes_ask": 0.43,
        "volume": 0,
        "open_interest": 0
      }
    }
  }
}

---

Full JavaScript Example:

Connect to: wss://api.delphiterminal.co/ws/prdi?api_key=YOUR_API_KEY

ws.onopen = () => {
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    action: 'subscribe',
    market_ids: ['34256'],
    message_types: ['prices']
  }));
};

ws.onmessage = (event) => {
  const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
  if (data.type === 'prices') console.log('Price:', data.data);
};

---

Connection Details:

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Protocol | WebSocket (wss://) |
| Keepalive | Ping every 54 seconds |
| Timeout | 60 seconds without pong |
| Max Message Size | 16 KB |

---

Notes:

- **Authentication required** via `api_key` query parameter
- You must use `market_id` (PredictIt market identifier) to subscribe
- **Prices only** — PredictIt does not provide orderbook depth or individual trade history
- PredictIt data is sourced via REST polling (60-second intervals)
- Only emits updates when market state changes (last trade price, best bid/ask)

## Example

- Request: `GET /ws/prdi?api_key=YOUR_API_KEY`
